title: Best practices for using flag targeting rules in an experiment | LaunchDarkly
description: Learn best practices for using flag targeting rules in experiments with LaunchDarkly. Discover how to optimize audience targeting and leverage findings to enhance your experimentation program and drive faster, data-informed decisions.
